---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Wraith
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? A clear and concise
description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried or thought about.

## Scope

Which area does this touch? (engine / identity / harvest / detect / behavior /
agent / snapshot / recaptcha / mcp / proxy / providers / docs / other)

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.

> [!NOTE]
> Wraith is intended for legitimate use: accessing your own accounts and data,
> authorized security testing, research, and personal automation. Feature
> requests that primarily enable fraud, account takeover, mass abuse, or
> circumventing access controls you aren't authorized to use will be declined.
